name: dsb-icd-scraper
title: DSB ICD (Insurance Calls Direct) Scraper
description: Scrapes app.insurancecallsdirect.com admin-calls-agents-report for the source-of-truth Billable Leads count per agent. Output is consumed by Supabase ingest-daily-scrape with mode=ib_leads_only to overwrite ib_leads_delivered without disturbing sales/dials/talk.
